status_rule.confirmed: supported by official docs and corroborated by XML
status_rule.partially_confirmed: strongly corroborated by XML but not yet doc-confirmed

uploaded_rc0_xml.notes: RC0/XML corroboration excerpt used as second authority tier.

docs_confirm: ROUTING is split into TRACK and INPUT/RHYTHM sections with MAIN/SUB/PHONES destinations.
rc0_xml_confirm: XML contains Routing:Track and Routing:Input/Rhythm sections in the same output group hierarchy.

docs_confirm: Docs confirm Track 1-6 destination assignment behavior for routing.
rc0_xml_confirm: XML encodes Track 1-6 entries with Bitwise1/2/4/8/16/32 in Routing:Track groups.
bundle_only_inference: Interpretation of bitwise storage as canonical wire-format semantics remains inference until explicit doc statement.

app_bundle_secondary: App schema index uses the same Bitwise1..Bitwise32 pattern for Track routing.

docs_confirm: Docs confirm INPUT/RHYTHM routing members and RHYTHM OUT / PHONES OUT related controls.
rc0_xml_confirm: XML contains Mic/Inst/Rhythm Input-Routing groups with Bitwise1..Bitwise64 and fields Rhythm Out, Phones Out, Input Thru.

docs_confirm: Docs confirm Bounce In behavior and track input-source controls (MIC/INST/RHYTHM).
rc0_xml_confirm: XML Bounce In group lists Mic/Inst/Rhythm sources with Bitwise1..Bitwise64 coding.
bundle_only_inference: Canonical guarantee that this bitwise layout is the persisted RC0 wire representation is not explicitly stated in docs.

app_bundle_secondary: App schema index reflects same Bounce In source set and bitwise labels.

docs_confirm: Docs confirm ASSIGN1-16 exist and are memory-scoped parameters.
rc0_xml_confirm: XML contains ASSIGN1..ASSIGN16 sections and includes assign-level copyPasteScope metadata.
bundle_only_inference: copyPasteScope behavior is XML/schema-level metadata and not explicitly described in official docs.

app_bundle_secondary: App schema index includes same ASSIGN1..16 copy/paste scope information.

docs_confirm: Docs enumerate SW, SOURCE, SOURCE MODE, ACT.LO/HI, TARGET, TARGET MIN/MAX fields.
rc0_xml_confirm: XML repeats Action.Source, Mode, Act.Low, Act.High, Target.Source, Target.Low, Target.High in assign blocks.

uploaded_rc0_xml: XML-RC600-EXCERPT: lines 1164-1192 (ASSIGN1 exemplar), repeated through ASSIGN16

docs_confirm: Docs confirm PEDAL MODE1-3 and PEDAL 1-9 function configuration.
rc0_xml_confirm: XML contains ICTL1/2/3_PEDAL1..9 with function plus Min/Max range fields.

docs_confirm: Docs confirm CTL1-4 and EXP1/2 control sources and assignment context.
rc0_xml_confirm: XML contains ECTL_CTL1..4 with CtrlFunc and ECTL_EXP1..2 with ExpFunc, each with Min/Max fields.

guardrail_notes.note: Retained as guardrail-only. XML shows an ignored RC-505mk2 compatibility-labeled B field, but no stronger evidence elevates it to a validated RC-600 semantic claim.
